lcHeader = ''

	lcHeader = Space(3)
Else
	lcHeader = crSigFiTef.cHeaders
Endif

laSigFiTra[1,1]='nTipos'

If !used('SigTef')

	llchecaSigTef = .t.
Endif
=seek('R'+_empr+Thisform.cOperacao+pcIdent,'SigTef','Ident')
Select SigTef
If !eof('SigTef')
	Delete in SigTef
Endif				
If llchecaSigTef

Endif

Parameters pcModal, pcIdChaves

If pcModal

Endif

ThisForm.pcidchaves = Iif(Type('pcIdChaves') = [C], pcIdChaves, [])

WITH Thisform
	.poDatamgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector',ThisForm.Name)

	Endif

	ENDWITH

=fLerFiscal()

Go Top

If !empty(this.value)
